refnamediv.refpurpose: Registers a table in the history_information table for tracking and also adds in side line history table and insert, update, delete rules on the table.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Registers a table in the history_information table for tracking and also adds in side line history table with same name as table but prefixed with history in the same schema as the original table. Puts in insert, update, delete rules on the table. Any inserts,updates,deletes of the geometry are recorded in the history table.

note.para: This function currently relies on a geometry column being registered in geometry_columns and fails if the geometry column is not present in geometry_columns table.

refsection.title: Examples
